gist.headline: Pocket-sized polish
gist.blurb: We've tidied up the mobile header so the logo sits front and center, with links and profile neatly organized below. Browsing the hive from your phone just got a little cozier.
gist.summary: Improved the mobile header layout by centering the logo and reorganizing the navigation links for better readability.
gist.impact: Mobile users will experience a cleaner, more intuitive navigation menu with better spacing and a prominent logo.
gist.visual_concept: A smartphone or small screen being organized. Polly the bee acting as a UI designer, moving chunky pixel blocks around on a mobile display.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny tool belt, carefully arranging glowing UI blocks on a giant retro smartphone screen. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
